name: DebridHub
description: Replaces the *arr stack: direct streaming via self-refreshing .strm files, batch downloads, Torznab search, a watchlist, a Seerr/Jellyseerr request webhook, and a library organizer.
overview: Stream and batch-download from Real-Debrid / AllDebrid inside Jellyfin.

versions.changelog: Fixes Request failed shown when deleting a torrent, removing a watchlist item, or clearing finished downloads. These endpoints returned an empty 204 response that the dashboard could not parse as JSON, so a successful action was reported as a failure. They now return a small JSON body.
